name: Vermeer-inspired Comic Style
description: A comic book style that emulates the classical oil painting techniques of Johannes Vermeer, featuring rich colors and soft gradients of light.

art_style.line_styles: Delicate, resembling fine brush strokes with varying thickness for depth.
art_style.inking_tools: Digital painting tools to create smooth, oil-like textures.
art_style.shading_style: Subtle gradient shading that mimics traditional oil work, using soft transitions to convey depth.
art_style.color_palette: Rich, muted tones, with a focus on blues, yellows, and earthy colors typical of Vermeer.
art_style.registration: Tight registration to ensure consistent color layering, emulating oil paint blending.
art_style.lettering_style: Elegant serif font that complements the classical aesthetic, with a handwritten quality.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: 1:6, realistic proportions to convey depth and dimensionality.
character_style.limb_proportions: Medium with a balance between slender and realistic.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Moderate details, emphasizing realistic body structures without excessive stylization.
character_style.eye_style: Detailed irises with an emphasis on expressiveness.
character_style.nose_style: Realistic but slightly softened to align with the artistic style.
character_style.mouth_style: Subtle curves for a gentle expression, reflecting emotion with simplicity.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: Moderate, ensuring emotional depth without cartoonish exaggeration.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Medium, allowing characters to blend softly into the background while still being recognizable.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Organic curves that maintain a naturalistic flow.
character_style.detail_complexity: Soft textures with minimal ornamental details.
character_style.texture_accents: Fine hair detail and gentle fabric folds to enhance realism.

chat.font: Elegant serif font, legible yet styled.

whisper.shape: Rounded rectangle with a smaller size
